case_title: OSKEN, EROL VON RABENAU MR. VS KARIMI, NAJMEI MS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,120.50 FILED BY OSKEN, EROL VON RABENAU MR. AS TO DEFENDANT KARIMI, NAJMEI MS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARIMI, NAJMEI MS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSKEN, EROL VON RABENAU MR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARIMI, NAJMEI MS. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $782.88 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KARIMI, NAJMEI MS.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,874.29 AS TO DEFENDANT KARIMI, NAJMEI MS.
